headline: How The PNC Financial Services Group (PNC) Investment Story Is Shifting With New Analyst Targets
summary: The average fair value estimate for PNC Financial Services Group has shifted from $250.59 to $246.48, a move of about 1.6% that captures the latest round of price target changes. Behind this adjustment, analysts have been pulling targets both higher and lower, reflecting ongoing debate about how much to pay for PNC’s earnings stream as views on growth, risk and execution evolve. As you read on, you will see how to interpret these changing targets and what to watch as the story continues to...
